gaps.description: src/index.js — package.json 'main' entry point exists and exports core API (startServer, createApp, stopServer, detect, getProfile, matchProfile, ensureOllama, chat, stt, tts, embed)
Docker port consistency — Dockerfile EXPOSE 1234, docker-compose.yml maps 1234:1234, healthcheck targets localhost:1234
Cloud fallback — timeout 5s (FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_MS), consecutive 3 errors (MAX_ERRORS), 60s probe restore (PROBE_INTERVAL_MS) in server/brain.js
Engine Registry Unification — brain.js, stt.js, tts.js migrated to use engine/registry.js (resolveModel, modelsForCapability); getModelPool removed
OpenAI-compatible API — /v1/embeddings, /v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech, /v1/models all implemented with correct response schemas
Health endpoint (GET /api/health) returns component status for ollama, stt, tts with degraded/unavailable states
OpenAI error format includes 'code' field — apiError() helper and errorHandler middleware both return { error: { message, type, code } }
Audio format validation via magic bytes — isValidAudio() checks before STT processing, returns 400 for invalid audio
ARCHITECTURE.md — cleaned up, directory tree updated, but known-limitations section still lists audio validation and error format as missing (stale text at lines 748-749)
Import maps removed — no dead #agentic-embed or #agentic-voice in package.json
Dead files removed (LocalModelsView.vue, CloudModelsView.vue, App-old.vue, ConfigPanel.vue, runtime/memory.js) and duplicate /api/ollama routes cleaned
Legacy /api/model-pool endpoint proxied with deprecation headers (X-Deprecated, Deprecation: true)
Server middleware (src/server/middleware.js) is a minimal error handler — no request validation, rate limiting, or security middleware
gaps.detail: Acceptable for local-first architecture. Production deployment would need enhancement.
